name: Tobacco Onions
recipeIngredient: 2 large yellow or sweet onions, peeled, thinly sliced,
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil to 350 degrees in a deep saucepan over medium heat.
2. In a medium bowl, combine and mix the dry ingredients (flour, paprika, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper).
3. Add the onions and toss to coat evenly with the flour mixture.
4. Remove onion rings, shaking off any excess flour.
5. Fry the onion rings in batches for 10 minutes, or until they are crisp and golden brown.
6. Drain the fried onion rings on paper towels.
Tobacco onions are easy to prepare and can also be used as a side dish or an accompaniment to hamburgers.
